items.raw_excerpt: If you're renting in Germany, you may have heard about a tenants' association - or Mieterverein. But you may not be aware that joining one could help save you money in the long run.
items.summary_en: Joining a Mieterverein, a German tenants' association, can help renters save money over time. Members get legal advice and support when negotiating rent with landlords. This local organization has helped many people in Germany fight unfair rent increases.
items.summary_ko: 독일의 세입자 협회인 Mieterverein에 가입하면 장기적으로 임차료를 절약할 수 있다. 조합원은 임대인과 집세를 협상할 때 법률 조언과 지원을 받는다. 이 로컬 단체는 독일에서 부당한 임대료 인상에 맞서 싸운 많은 사람들을 도왔다.
items.title_en: How a German tenants' association can help you lower your rent
items.title_ko: 독일 세입자 협회가 집세를 낮추는 방법
items.title_original: How a 'Mieterverein' can help you reduce your rent in Germany

items.raw_excerpt: Officers arrested 23-year-old man in Paris after he allegedly admitted he intended to set fire to one of the French capital's largest parks, a police source said Saturday.
items.summary_en: Police arrested a 23-year-old man in Paris after he admitted he planned to set fire to one of the city's largest parks. The suspect was taken into custody on Saturday. No injuries were reported.
items.summary_ko: 프랑스 파리에서 23세 남성이 도시에서 가장 큰 공원 중 하나에 방화를 시도하려 했다고 자백한 후 경찰에 체포되었다. 용의자는 토요일에 구금되었다. 인명 피해는 보고되지 않았다.
items.title_en: Man arrested over fire in Paris park
items.title_ko: 파리 공원 방화 기도 혐의로 남성 체포
items.title_original: Man arrested over fire in Paris park

items.raw_excerpt: It can be frustrating having to regularly check which date is meant by a given week number, but there’s method in the numerical merry-go-round.
items.summary_en: Many Danes plan their lives using week numbers instead of calendar dates. This habit can confuse outsiders who are not used to the system. But there is a clear logic behind this Danish tradition.
items.summary_ko: 덴마크인들은 일정을 정할 때 날짜 대신 주차 번호를 자주 사용합니다. 이 습관은 익숙하지 않은 사람들에게 혼란을 줄 수 있지만, 나름의 논리가 있습니다.
items.title_en: Why Danes Prefer Week Numbers Over Dates
items.title_ko: 덴마크인들이 왜 날짜 대신 주차 번호를 쓸까?
items.title_original: Why do Danes insist on using week numbers instead of dates?

items.raw_excerpt: First Nations leaders in Alberta are turning to a campaign that saw record on-reserve voter turnout in an effort to tip the scales against the separatist movement during October's provincial referendum.
items.summary_en: Indigenous leaders in Alberta are launching a major campaign to get out the vote ahead of October's separatism referendum. The effort follows record voter turnout on First Nations reserves in recent elections. Leaders hope strong participation will help defeat the separatist movement in the provincial vote.
items.summary_ko: 앨버타주의 원주민 지도자들이 10월 분리주의 국민투표를 앞두고 대규모 투표 독려 캠페인을 시작합니다. 이번 캠페인은 최근 선거에서 기록적인 예약 지역 투표율을 기록한 후 추진되는 것입니다. 지도자들은 강력한 참여가 주민투표에서 분리주의 운동을 패배시키는 데 도움이 될 것으로 기대하고 있습니다.
items.title_en: Alberta First Nations Rally Voters Against Separatism Referendum
items.title_ko: 앨버타 원주민 투표 독려 캠페인, 분리주의 반대 나서
items.title_original: Alberta First Nations intend to 'rock the vote' against separatism

items.raw_excerpt: A famous Cuban dissident artist and musician, Luis Manuel Otero Alcántara, arrived in Miami on Saturday after being released from a five-year prison sentence on the condition that he leave his country.
items.summary_en: Luis Manuel Otero Alcántara, a Cuban dissident artist, arrived in Miami on Saturday. He was released from prison after five years on the condition that he leave Cuba. He is now living in exile in the United States.
items.summary_ko: 루이스 마누엘 오테로 알칸타라는 토요일 마이애미에 도착했습니다. 쿠바를 떠날 조건으로 5년 수감 생활 끝에 석방된 반체제 예술가입니다. 현재 미국에서 망명 생활을 하고 있습니다.
items.title_en: Cuban Dissident Artist Arrives in Miami After 5 Years in Prison
items.title_ko: 쿠바 반체제 예술가, 5년 수감 후 미국 망명 도착
items.title_original: Cuban artist and dissident exiled from country after 5 years in prison arrives in US

items.raw_excerpt: The Cozumel raccoon is one of the cutest species of animals you'll ever see, but it's also critically endangered.
items.summary_en: The Cozumel raccoon is one of the cutest species of animals you'll ever see. But it's also critically endangered.
items.summary_ko: 쿠베루메의 아 raccoon은 가장 귀여운 동물 중 하나입니다. 하지만 위급하게 멸종 위기에 처해 있습니다.
items.title_en: Cute but endangered: The dwarf raccoons of Cozumel
items.title_ko: 사랑스럽지만 위험한: 쿠베루메의 난쟁이 아 raccoon
items.title_original: Cute but endangered: The dwarf raccoons of Cozumel

items.raw_excerpt: Bombay HC stays bail for Shiv Sena corporator Ramesh Mhatre in doctors' assault case, orders him to surrender by July 19.
items.summary_en: The Bombay High Court canceled the bail of Shiv Sena corporator Ramesh Mhatre. He was charged in an assault case involving doctors. The court ordered him to surrender by July 19.
items.summary_ko: 뭄바이 고등법원은 시브 세나 의원 라메시 마트레의 보석을 취소했습니다. 그는 의사 폭력 사건에 연루되어 있으며, 법원은 그에게 7월 19일까지 자수할 것을 명령했습니다.
items.title_en: Bombay court cancels bail for Shiv Sena corporator
items.title_ko: 뭄바이 법원, 의사 폭력 사건 시브 세나 의원 보석 취소
items.title_original: Doctors assault case: Bombay High Court cancels bail of Shiv Sena corporator

items.raw_excerpt: En un contexto demográfico donde la tendencia habitual de los jóvenes es abandonar el medio rural para buscar un futuro en las grandes urbes, la historia de N
items.summary_en: Nahum Salinas, 23, left Valencia to run a pharmacy in Puente de Vadillos, a small hamlet in Cuenca's highlands. The villagers welcomed him warmly, and he now serves several nearby towns. He encourages other young people to try rural life, saying it can be better than big-city living.
items.summary_ko: 23세 청년 약사 나훔 살리나스가 발렌시아를 떠나 쿠에카 산악지대의 작은 마을 푸엔데 바디요스에서 약국을 열었다. 주민들은 그를 따뜻하게 맞아었고, 그는 인근 여러 마을까지 돌보며 일하고 있다. 그는 젊은이들에게 도시보다 살기 좋은 시골에서 기회를 잡으라고 권한다.
items.title_en: A 23-year-old pharmacist leaves Valencia for a tiny village pharmacy — and finds a second family
items.title_ko: 23세 약사, 발렌시아 떠나 시골 마을 약국 운영 시작 — "가족 같은 마을people를 만났다"
items.title_original: De Valencia a una farmacia en un pequeño pueblo de Cuenca con solo 23 años: "Aquí es como si tuviera una segunda familia" - El Digital de Cuenca

items.raw_excerpt: Health Minister orders inquiry into KMSCL's ₹19.13 lakh corporate membership at Thiruvananthapuram Tennis Club, amid public fund misuse concerns.
items.summary_en: Kerala's Health Minister has ordered an inquiry into KMSCL's purchase of a ₹19.13 lakh corporate membership at Thiruvananthapuram Tennis Club. The move comes amid concerns over misuse of public funds by the state health corporation.
items.summary_ko: 케랄라주 보건장관이 주 보건공사 KMSCL의 티루난타푸람 테니스클럽 법인 회원권 19.13 lakh루피 지출에 대해 조사를 지시했습니다. 공공자금 부적절 사용 우려가 제기된 가운데 나온 조치입니다.
items.title_en: Health Minister orders inquiry into KMSCL's tennis club membership spending
items.title_ko: 케랄라 보건장관, KMSCL 테니스클럽 회비 사용에 조사 명령
items.title_original: Health Minister orders inquiry into KMCSL obtaining corporate membership at Thiruvananthapuram Tennis Club

items.raw_excerpt: A 49-year-old man has been arrested on suspicion of dangerous driving resulting in injury after he rear-ended a moped ridden by a man in his 70s, who was delivering newspapers, with his car, and then fled the scene in Ota City, Gunma Prefecture. According to police, the incident occurred at…
items.summary_en: A 49-year-old man was arrested in Gunma Prefecture for dangerous driving after hitting a moped. The victim, a man in his 70s, was delivering newspapers at the time of the crash. The driver fled the scene but was later caught by police.
items.summary_ko: 군마현 타 시에서 신문을 배달하던 70대 남성의 오토바이를 추돌하고 도주한 49세 남성이 경찰에 붙잡혔습니다. 이 남성은 위험 운전 혐의를 받고 있으며, 사고로 인해 피해자가 부상을 입었습니다. 경찰은 사고 직후 현장을 떠난 용의자를 수사 끝에 체포했습니다.
items.title_en: Man arrested for hit-and-run involving delivery worker in Gunma
items.title_ko: 군마현 배달원 뺑소니 사건, 49세 남성 체포
items.title_original: Man arrested over hit-and-run involving newspaper delivery worker in Gunma

items.raw_excerpt: “Despite repeated requests, the hospital has refused to discharge him or allow us to shift him to a private hospital of our choice,” Gitanjali Angmo said in a post on X on Sunday (Jul 19).
items.summary_en: Gitanjali Angmo says her husband, activist Sonam Wangchuk, is being kept at a government hospital against their wishes. She posted on social media asking for court help to transfer him to a hospital of their choice. The hospital has refused repeated requests to discharge him or allow the move.
items.summary_ko: 인도 환경 운동가 소남 왕축의 아내 기탄잘리 앙모가 남편이 본인 의사와 상관없이 정부 병원에 머물고 있다고 밝혔다. 그녀는 소셜 미디어에 법원에 도움을 요청하는 글을 올렸다. 병원은 퇴원이나 이송 요청을 계속 거부해왔다.
items.title_en: Wife of Indian activist asks court to let him move to private hospital
items.title_ko: 인도 활동가의 아내, 법원에 민간 병원 이송 요청
items.title_original: Wife of Indian activist Wangchuk asks court to move him to private hospital

items.raw_excerpt: Although this at first sounds like a medical issue, it actually has nothing to do with broken feet.
items.summary_en: This French expression sounds like a medical issue, but it has nothing to do with broken feet. It is a common idiom used to describe something that annoys you greatly.
items.summary_ko: 이 프랑스어 표현은 질병처럼 들리지만, 사실 발 골절과는 아무런 관련이 없다. 누군가를 심하게 귀찮게 할 때 쓰는 흔한 관용표현이다.
items.title_en: French expression of the day: Casser les pieds
items.title_ko: 오늘의 프랑스어 표현: Casser les pieds
items.title_original: French expression of the day: Casser les pieds

items.raw_excerpt: A man fell or jumped from an apartment building in Nagoya on Sunday morning, hitting a woman who was walking on the sidewalk below. The woman died and the man is in a serious condition, police said. According to police and fire department officials, a call came into 119 at…
items.summary_en: A man fell or jumped from an apartment building in Nagoya on Sunday morning. He struck a woman walking on the sidewalk below, killing her. The man is in serious condition, police said.
items.summary_ko: 나고야의 한 아파트 건물에서 남성이 추락하거나 투신해 아래 인도를 지나가던 여성에게 부딪혔습니다. 이 사고로 여성이 숨지고 남성은 중태인 것으로 경찰은 밝혔습니다.
items.title_en: Man Falls from Building, Kills Pedestrian in Nagoya
items.title_ko: 나고야 아파트서 추락한 남성, 보행자 사망 사고
items.title_original: Man falls from apartment building, hitting and killing female pedestrian in Nagoya
